UNLAWFUL DETAINER MOTION 501, PLAINTIFF JOHN WAI'S MOTION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT IS GRANTED AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF SHALL RECOVER $4,500 IN OUTSTANDING SETTLEMENT BALANCE; $575 IN ATTORNEY'S FEES; AND $510 IN COSTS. PLAINTIFF FAILS TO INDICATE STIPULATION PROVISION ALLOWING INTEREST AND BASIS FOR CALCULATION OF INTEREST. ORDER IS SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE RONALD E. QUIDACHAY, CLERK: M. OLOPERNES, NOT REPORTED

MINI MINUTES: Saul Ferster, Esq. appearing for Plaintiff. Court ordered Does 1-30 dismissed at the request of plaintiff. Proceedings not reported. (610)

Off Calendar Jun-17-2013 Continued To Aug-13-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Entry Of Judgment
Off Calendar Jun-28-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Saul Martin Ferster, Esq. for John E. Wai, Plaintiff and moving party / No appearances by defendant and opposing party

Court adopts the tentative ruling adopted as follows: PLAINTIFF JOHN WAI's Motion For Entry Of Judgment is GRANTED as follows: Plaintiff shall recover $4,500 in outstanding settlement balance; $575 in attorney's fees; and $510 in costs. Plaintiff fails to indicate Stipulation provision allowing interest and basis for calculation of interest. Order is signed in open court. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not reported (D501)
